TestCase z8Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n > 0 && t1.a != NULL) {
        int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
        follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    } else {
        follow_case.a = NULL;
    }
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n <= 0 || follow_case.a == NULL) {
        // No elements to modify, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    int idx = 0; // select the first element as the "random" element to keep deterministic behavior
    if (follow_case.n > 1) {
        idx = (idx + 1) % follow_case.n;
    }
    follow_case.a[idx] += 1;
    
    return follow_case;
}
